purpose: Non-copyrightable statistical profile of real högskoleprovet, used to make AI-generated items match real style/difficulty. Extracted offline by scripts/hp-calibrate.js from past prov. NO verbatim item text is stored here — only aggregate statistics. Facts (counts, formats) are not copyrightable; expression (the items) is, and is deliberately excluded.
legal_note: Generated items are original expression in the real format. Real prov are used only as a statistical reference, never redistributed.

ORD.stem_pattern: single target word (sometimes short phrase); 5 single-word answer alternatives a–e; pick closest in meaning
ORD.vocab_frequency_band: low-to-mid frequency Swedish; includes loanwords, archaic, domain terms
ORD.distractor_strategy: near-synonyms, same semantic field, false-friend morphology

LAS.stem_pattern: question about a Swedish non-fiction passage

MEK.stem_pattern: passage with 1–3 gaps; choose the alternative that fits all gaps coherently

ELF.stem_pattern: question about an English passage; vocab-in-context and inference

fixed_options: I och II är lika stora
(1) och (2) var för sig är tillräckliga
NOG.stem_pattern: is the given information sufficient to answer?

DTK.stem_pattern: read value/relation from a diagram, table, or map
DTK.asset: inline structured data → client renders SVG

scaling.note: raw→skalpoäng (normerad) tables are public UHR facts; store per administration in norm_tables.json (not yet seeded). scaled range 0.0–2.0.

extracted.note: Filled by scripts/hp-calibrate.js. Each run appends an administration's aggregate stats (counts, length distributions, answer-position histogram). Never raw item text.
